CGI / Compositing

3D Space RnD

A CGI visual exploring space-inspired environments, atmospheric motion and immersive digital imagery for a next-generation club experience.

Project info

Role
CG Artist / Compositing
Type
Creative proposal
Tools
Blender / Davinci Resolve

Concept

3D Space RnD was developed as a CGI visual research proposal together with Slaps Creative for UNVRS Ibiza.

The project uses space as a creative framework to explore atmosphere, scale and visual immersion within the context of a next-generation club experience. Rather than approaching the imagery as a literal sci-fi environment, the proposal builds a digital universe of abstract forms, cinematic lighting and atmospheric motion.

Through shading, animation and compositing, the piece explores how CGI can help shape a more immersive visual identity for a nightlife space — connecting spatial design, music culture and digital spectacle.

Next project →
